entry.title: Baby Grayson-Wayne (Batcest Baby #1)
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,926Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 18

Summary: Dick Grayson delivers their first baby and things are beginning to change for him and the Batfamily.He will face past lovers and the new public opinion on him while learning how to be a father with his partners.Damian is 17, Dick is 27, Bruce is 50 (physically de-aged from the previous Part), Jason is 25 and Tim is 21.{Tags will update with chapters}

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,628Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.

entry.title: Hush Little One, You Are Safe Now
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,860Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 1,425

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,916Chapters: 8/16Kudos: 395

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,341Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 78

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: My favorite ghost
entry.summary:
Author: aikane

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,501Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 76

Summary: The image in front of him is solid and warm, like a real person- like it’s not a ghost. And this version of his brother looks closer to Jason in age, with gray hair at his temple and crow’s feet lining his eyes. Like what a Dick Grayson who lived might have looked like.  As Jason is forced to conclude, this Dick Grayson is very much alive. But that’s not possible. Because that’s a nice thing for the universe to bestow upon him, and Jason Todd does not get given nice things. A Knight Fight AU

entry.title: Tired Stars
entry.summary:
Author: ResidentJazz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,110Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 479

Summary: Dick Grayson has always known how to smile on command, how to play the part people expect — even when it tears him apart. After a public breakdown and a mission that pushes him past his limits, Bruce’s disappointment feels like another verdict he can’t escape. But Jason refuses to let him spiral alone.In the quiet of a safe house, between coffee that tastes like ash, late-night movies, and the weight of a case too close to home, Dick has to confront the question he’s never dared to ask: who is he when he isn’t what Bruce made him?One step at a time, he’ll have to find out.

entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Summary: Signing up for the Pussy Sharing Program could turn out to be a mistake, Jason thinks. The soft leather chastity belt around Jason’s crotch chafes against his skin. The crotch piece is molded perfectly to the shape of his pubis, so that no matter how much he moves, the mouth of the portal will always cover his sex, giving his user full access to his pussy and clit. Jason has no access to his own genitals at all—which means no touching, no masturbating, no pleasuring himself twenty-four-seven. That honor solely belongs to whoever holds the other end of the Jason-Pussy—the Anonymous User he signed his autonomy to.

entry.title: Big Brother
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,230Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 187

Summary: He can no longer remember his name. The way things vibrate around him—the taps of footsteps, the clanking of tools—make the room feel like a tiny space. Perhaps something squarish with only ventilation and no windows. He is hooked up to the wall and mattress with chains and straps. A straitjacket keeps his arms pinned around his torso and secured behind him. On the bottom, he wears nothing except for the dildos thrusting into him. The man who comes to tend to him has a handsome face and a gorgeous smile. The man he only knows as Big Brother.

entry.title: A Bark Worse than His Bite
entry.summary:
Author: Skalidra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,705Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 2,933

Summary: The Red Hood is a mystery. Someone that came into Gotham out of nowhere and immediately carved out a piece of Black Mask's territories for himself, establishing himself almost immediately as someone to be respected. By all accounts, he's highly skilled, efficient, and incredibly dangerous. And no one has any idea who he is.

entry.title: The world is dull when I’m not with you
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,494Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: That’s his pregnant husband caressing his growing belly in such a tender way that the man nearly started crying, just as he did during the first ultrasound. The issue now is that Jason is fucking terrified, the prospect of becoming a father—will he even be able to handle this? To look after Dick and his child? Would he be able to be a suitable father, or will he fail them just as Willis and Bruce had failed him? Shit, will the child even like him? The angelic voice sings, “You’re brooding again, Little Wing. I thought you refused to be like our old man—always brooding and brooding.” To the untrained eyes, Jason’s flinch is invincible, but being one of the longest-trained vigilantes, Dick notices. He squeezes Jason’s bicep as one would squeeze a stress ball, grounding him. “Yes, you’ll be a good father; yes, our child would love you dearly as I do; yes, you will always take care of us until your last breath and; yes, you’ll be an amazing parental figure, Jay.”

entry.title: Common Grounds
entry.summary:
Author: MewSefet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,124Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 251

Summary: What happens when you accidently start dating your son's English teacher? When Dick and Jason find themselves pushed together on a rainy day in their usual coffee shop, neither of them expect their lives are already intertwined. How casual flirting and mutual interest turns into dating, turns into an identity reveal that neither of them expect, but should have figured out earlier. Eg. the Detective!Dick Grayson/Teacher!Jason Todd fic that no one asked for. Including Jason is Damian's teacher, and Damian is 80% Dick's son and identity shenanigans in a Civillian!AU.

entry.title: Petrification
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,834Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 311

Summary: Vampires don’t die in the sun; they turn into marble statues when the sun rises, and return to their normal forms when the sun sets. The Vampire King had been in the middle of fucking Jason on his throne when the sun rose.
